globalTheme.prompt: Premium horror platform overture. Slow pulse, analog tape texture, restrained low brass, sparse choral air, no jump scares, loop-safe tail.
globalTheme.notes: Homepage, landing funnel, onboarding, default non-story pages

storyScores.prompt: Psychological commuter-line dread. Metallic resonances, distant rail rhythm, whispered harmonic cluster.
Gothic cathedral mystery. Tension strings, bell overtones, low organ drones.
Folk ritual horror. Frame drum heartbeat, bowed drone, weathered choir fragments.
Cosmic horror score. Cold synth bed, distant radio chirps, glacial harmonic movement.
Apartment liminal-space mystery. Piano ostinato, hallway reverb tails, soft sub pulses.
Found-footage investigation score. Tape hiss, detuned drones, intermittent camera-motor rhythm.
Occult conspiracy thriller. Clandestine pulse, antique strings, maritime ambience hints.
Winter slasher pressure score. Tight rhythmic stabs, icy percussive textures, sustained dread bass.
Haunted institution atmosphere. Rusted mechanical hum, string harmonics, breathy choir smear.
Techno-paranormal thriller bed. Glitch clockwork, spectral synth pulses, restrained industrial bass.
